features: ARTS, CRAFT & MORE: 151 Glue Dots, easy to use with craft materials, model making, paper, glass, posters, or photos. Add bows and tags securely to wrapped gifts. Pack contains 112 quick stick glue dots.
PRECISE & ACCURATE: 151 Glue Dots, perfect size for precise and accurate placing of craft embellishments, use with sequins, beads, small decorative stones without any mess.
EASY PEEL: 151 Glue Dots, can be removed easily without leaving a sticky residue behind. Perfect to place celebration banners and decorations for birthdays and other special occasions.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use 151 pack 112 Glue Dots
